name: pre_existing_temporal_delete_hang
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E2(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule TJ1 salience 3 when $a : E0() $b : E2(this before[50ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule CH2 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,50ms] $a) $c : E2(this before[50ms,100ms] $b) then end
rule J3 when $e : E1($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD4 salience 6 when D() then end
rule ND5 salience 3 when not D() P() then end
_finding: GRADUATED (D-176; ex-hang-backlog, flushed D-116, guarded D-117): the ORIGINAL engine non-termination repro — temporal-join + external-delete-in-mark-window + same-window re-fire (the c3 flavor: deletes an unmarked fact whose tuple PARTNER is marked).
